boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: Adaugă <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> la sfârșitul fiecărei mutări (un punct pe celulă)
boonClickbaitDescription: Adaugă <multi>+2 Multi</multi> pentru fiecare reroll al magazinului în acest run (acum <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
